extraction.one_line_summary: SKJELMOSE Mattias followed GALL Felix's attack with 1km to go on Villars climb, countered inside final 500m to take stage and yellow by 3 seconds
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL launched decisive move 6.5km from summit after KNOX pacing destroyed VLASOV, but insufficient gap management allowed AYUSO group chase-back
GALL attacked solo inside 1km when caught group hesitated, revealing strength gaps before SKJELMOSE's superior finishing kick
SOUDAL Quick-Step burned CATTANEO early causing VLASOV elimination, prioritizing selection over controlled tempo despite KUNG's jersey

rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: Won from reduced group and took yellow after following late move, showing both climbing and tactical maturity beyond his prior palmares
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: 6.5km solo attack caught by AYUSO group with 12-second deficit, insufficient power advantage on medium-length climbs against GC rivals
rider_signals.GALL Felix: positive: Nearly took first pro win with 1km attack from chase group, strong enough to isolate but lacked final 500m acceleration
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Led successful chase of EVENEPOEL from behind, controlled effort yielding only 12 seconds loss while EVENEPOEL burned matches solo
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Dropped when CATTANEO set early pace for Quick-Step, concerning weakness on 10km first-category effort
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: negative: Lost yellow after dropping with 6.5km remaining, unable to follow even initial EVENEPOEL acceleration
